algorithm: longest common subsequence of two random binary strings
conjectured_mean_closed_form: → γ ≈ 0.812 (binary alphabet) — exact value is an open problem
certificate: exact E[LCS]/n by enumeration of all string pairs: n=1: E[LCS]/n=0.5000; n=2: E[LCS]/n=0.5625; n=3: E[LCS]/n=0.6042; n=4: E[LCS]/n=0.6309; n=5: E[LCS]/n=0.6492; n=6: E[LCS]/n=0.6633; n=7: E[LCS]/n=0.6745; n=8: E[LCS]/n=0.6836
